SEARCH
Package DBConnection

Class DBConnection

java.lang.Object
DBConnection.DBConnection
public class DBConnection extends Object
Singleton class responsible for managing the database connection pool. Handles the initialization of the connection pool, table creation (schema setup), and provides methods to get and release connections.

  • Constructor Details

    • DBConnection

      private DBConnection()
      Private constructor to enforce Singleton pattern. Initializes the blocking queue for the connection pool.

  • Method Details

    • initializeConnection

      public static void initializeConnection(String host, String schema, String user, String pass) throws SQLException, ClassNotFoundException
      Initializes the database connection pool and sets up the database schema. This method should be called once at application startup.
      Parameters:
      host - The database host address.
      schema - The database schema name.
      user - The database username.
      pass - The database password.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database access error occurs.
      ClassNotFoundException - If the JDBC driver class is not found.

    • getInstance

      public static DBConnection getInstance()
      Returns the singleton instance of the DBConnection.
      Returns:
      The DBConnection instance.

    • getConnection

      public Connection getConnection() throws SQLException
      Retrieves a connection from the pool. Waits up to 5 seconds if the pool is empty. Validates the connection before returning it.
      Returns:
      A valid Connection object.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If the pool is exhausted or connection creation fails.

    • releaseConnection

      public void releaseConnection(Connection con)
      Releases a connection back to the pool. If the pool is full, the connection is closed.
      Parameters:
      con - The connection to release.

    • closeConnection

      public void closeConnection()
      Closes all connections in the pool and shuts down the pool.

    • createTableSubscriber

      public static void createTableSubscriber(Connection con1)

      public static void createTableOrder(Connection con1)
